backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Creative Prints and Design app, defining data types (Product, GalleryItem, CustomOrder, StoreOrder, PaymentConfirmation, UserProfile) and managing CRUD operations with access control, blob storage, and admin authorization via the guaranteed admin email.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades legacy StoreOrder records (missing the status field) to the new schema by adding a default 'pending' status, and drops the obsolete passwordResetRequests map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (store page, cart/checkout, admin access control, admin dashboard) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase structure and responsibilities.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Deployment guide listing prerequisites (Node.js, pnpm, DFX) and a build/deploy checklist for the Creative Prints and Design application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Creative Prints and Design - 3D Printing Services', linking the favicon, applying a CSP upgrade-insecure-requests meta tag, and mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, store, gallery, custom order, checkout, order success, admin), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/GalleryMan: Admin panel component for managing gallery items, supporting add, edit, and delete operations with image file upload (including progress tracking) via dialog forms and a data table.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin panel component that displays all store orders in a table with status badges, and allows admins to update each order's status via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsMa: Admin panel component that lists all payment confirmation submissions sorted by newest first, with a dialog to view the uploaded payment proof image for each entry.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: Admin UI component for managing products (CRUD) with a form dialog for adding/editing products including image upload with progress tracking, and a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/AuthDialog.tsx: Modal dialog providing tabbed login and signup forms with password reset support, input validation, error display, and toast notifications; blocks signup with the reserved admin email.
frontend/src/components/DeploymentErrorS: A React component that displays a styled error screen with the error name, message, stack trace, and component stack, along with buttons to copy error details to clipboard or reload the page.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors in the component tree and renders the DeploymentErrorScreen with error details instead of the crashed UI.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, cart icon with item count, admin link, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality, wrapping page content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Zustand store providing authentication state and actions (login, signup, logout, password reset) backed by localStorage, with a hardcoded permanent admin account and optional backend registration callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store with localStorage persistence managing shopping cart state, including add, remove, update quantity, clear, and total price/item count computations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity/status state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: TanStack Query hooks wrapping all backend actor calls for products, gallery items, orders, and other entities, providing typed query and mutation hooks with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, plus a utility class for a grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that verifies admin privileges via Internet Identity and renders tabbed management sections for Products, Orders, Gallery, and Payments. Redirects unauthenticated or non-admin users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that displays cart items, collects customer info, optionally uploads a payment proof file, and submits one order per cart item to the backend. On success, clears the cart and navigates to the order success page.
frontend/src/pages/CustomOrderPage.tsx: Custom order form page that requires authentication and accepts a name, contact info, description, and an optional .stl/.obj model file upload before submitting a custom order to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page that fetches and displays all gallery items in a responsive grid with images, titles, and descriptions, showing loading and empty states as needed.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section with a call-to-action for the store and custom orders, followed by a features section highlighting the 3D printing service's key selling points.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page that reads customer name, total, and item count from URL search params and displays order details along with a step-by-step summary of next steps.
frontend/src/pages/StorePage.tsx: Customer-facing store page that fetches and displays all products in a responsive grid with product cards supporting add-to-cart functionality, loading skeletons, and a cart icon with item count in the header.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, OKLCH-based design token colors, custom border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Creative Prints and Design e-commerce app, its implemented features (storefront, cart/checkout, admin panel with Internet Identity auth), and pending feature requests.
